rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF ALLAN D. HOWELL IRREVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Petition For Order Authorizing Establishment Of Allan D. Howell Irrevocable Trust
rulings.Rulings: Continued to July 14, 2014. Counsel was instructed to file a declaration re the issues raised in the hearing notes, after which the petition would be taken under submission. Local Rules require all documents to be filed 3 court days before the hearing date, which would have been Wednesday, June 25. No declaration has been filed, and no courtesy copy of the petition provided as of Thursday morning, June 26. New filing deadline is Wednesday, July 10. If nothing is filed, or no courtesy copies delivered, an appearance will be required to determine whether this petition should be taken off calendar.
